[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010111011 6
1 0111100101 6
2 0101010101 5
3 0100110110 5
4 0011011111 7
5 1110111111 9

7 1101101010 6
